name: Alan.s.robin
description:
AI-Powered Healthcare Assistant with Doctor Appointments & Reminders

📌 Project Overview

This project is an AI-powered healthcare assistant that helps users consult a chatbot for health-related queries, book doctor appointments, and set medicine reminders using Google Calendar. It combines natural language AI, automated scheduling, and virtual consultations into a seamless healthcare experience.


---

🛠️ Technologies Used

Google Gemini AI – For intelligent chatbot responses.

Streamlit – For building an interactive web-based UI.

Google Calendar API – To book doctor appointments and set reminders.

Google Meet API – To schedule virtual doctor consultations.

Google Authentication (OAuth & Service Account) – For secure access to Google services.

NLTK (Natural Language Toolkit) – For processing user queries.



---

🚀 Why We Created It

Bridging the gap between patients and healthcare professionals.

Providing instant AI-driven health advice before consulting a doctor.

Reducing missed medications by scheduling reminders.

Making healthcare more accessible with virtual consultations.



---

🔑 Key Features

✅ AI Chatbot for Healthcare Advice – Get instant answers about symptoms, medications, and health tips.
✅ Doctor Appointment Booking – Schedule an in-person or virtual appointment with a doctor via Google Calendar.
✅ Google Meet Integration – Generates a video call link for remote consultations.
✅ Medicine Reminder System – Set alerts for taking medicines on time using Google Calendar.
✅ Secure Google Authentication – Ensures only authorized users access their own calendar and appointments.


---

This project streamlines healthcare access with AI & automation—making doctor consultations and medical reminders more convenient than ever! 🚀

Would you like a detailed README file for deployment instructions?

name: PixelPulse Inc
project_name: EduPulse - AI Based Gamified Study tracker
description:
EduPulse – AI-Based Gamified Study Tracker
EduPulse is an innovative AI-powered study tracker that makes learning engaging and efficient. Designed for students, it combines gamification, AI-driven summarization, and progress tracking to help you stay on top of your studies while leveling up your subjects.

Key Features:
✅ Gamified Learning – Earn XP for completing topics and level up each subject.
✅ AI-Powered Summarization – Instantly generate concise topic summaries with one click.
✅ Subject & Topic Management – Easily add, organize, and track study topics.
✅ Notes & Reminders – Attach notes to topics for quick reference.
✅ Calendar Integration – View topics from specific days for better planning.
✅ XP Analytics – Monitor your study progress with in-depth XP tracking.

Who is it for?
EduPulse is perfect for students who want a structured, fun, and AI-assisted way to manage their studies efficiently.

Developed by: PixelPulse Inc. | Semester 2, AI & ML Department

🚀 Transform the way you study with EduPulse today!

name: Sacheth Sivaprasad
description: Crop Disease Classifier is a web-based application that helps farmers and agricultural researchers identify plant diseases using machine learning. The system allows users to upload images of crop leaves, which are analyzed by a pre-trained AI model for plant disease identification. The model predicts the disease along with confidence scores, enabling users to take timely action. Built with Flask for the backend and Hugging Face Transformers for image classification, the project aims to provide an accessible and efficient solution for early disease detection in crops.

name: Fabena Franklin
description:
🚜 FarmGuard App - Empowering Farmers with Technology 🌾

        --STRAIGHT TO YOU---

FarmGuard is a web-based platform designed to help farmers sell their products, monitor their crops, and purchase farming essentials directly from suppliers without middlemen. The platform aims to:
	•	✅ Increase farmers’ profit margins by allowing direct sales to consumers or wholesalers.
	•	✅ Provide AI-powered crop monitoring and demand analysis (simulated without real APIs).
	•	✅ Offer a marketplace for seeds, fertilizers, and tools directly from suppliers.
✅ Our Vision

	🚜 “Empowering Farmers. Reducing Middlemen. Boosting Agriculture.”
FarmGuard aims to create a sustainable digital ecosystem where farmers can directly connect with consumers, wholesalers, and suppliers, increasing their profits and making agriculture smarter.

name: Alan Biji Alex
description:
*Report on AI-Driven Safety and Privacy Website*

*Introduction*
This report outlines the features, functionality, and impact of the website designed to improve user safety and privacy online. The platform integrates three core tools aimed at protecting users from online scams, enhancing data security awareness, and enabling anonymous crime reporting.

*1. Phishing Detection System*
The phishing detection tool is developed to analyze suspicious URLs and identify potential fraud. By leveraging AI algorithms and online threat databases, this system can:
- Detect fake websites that impersonate legitimate platforms.
- Identify phishing attempts that aim to steal user credentials or financial information.
- Provide users with instant results, categorizing URLs as "Safe" or "Phishing Detected."

*2. Terms & Conditions Analyzer*
This tool scans Terms & Conditions (ToS) documents for potential security risks and privacy concerns. It offers the following benefits:
- Identifies hidden clauses that may compromise user data privacy.
- Detects potential legal loopholes that companies may exploit to misuse consumer information.
- Provides easy-to-understand summaries of complex legal jargon to inform users about potential risks.

*3. Anonymous Reporting System*
The anonymous reporting platform is designed to provide a secure channel for individuals to report crimes without revealing their identity. Key features include:
- End-to-end encryption for complete privacy.
- An intuitive interface that simplifies the reporting process.
- Real-time alerts that notify concerned authorities for immediate action.

*Technological Implementation*
- *Flask Framework:* The website is built using Flask, a lightweight yet powerful Python web framework that ensures fast development and scalability.
- *AI Integration:* Machine learning models are integrated to enhance the accuracy of phishing detection and ToS analysis.
- *Encryption Protocols:* Advanced encryption ensures that data shared via the anonymous reporting platform remains secure and private.

*User Impact and Benefits*
- *Enhanced Online Safety:* Users gain confidence in identifying phishing websites, protecting their data from cybercriminals.
- *Informed Decisions:* The Terms & Conditions analyzer empowers users with knowledge about how their data is managed.
- *Empowered Reporting:* The anonymous reporting platform enables individuals to voice their concerns without risking exposure or retaliation.

*Conclusion*
This AI-driven platform combines security, privacy, and public safety into one cohesive solution. By offering phishing detection, Terms & Conditions analysis, and anonymous reporting, the website provides comprehensive protection for individuals navigating the digital world. Its robust features ensure both proactive prevention and responsive action in safeguarding users online.

name: Keerthana N S
description:
Your AI-based legal research tool sounds powerful and comprehensive. Here's an improved project description that integrates all these features:


AI-Powered Legal Research Assistant

Project Overview:
The AI-Powered Legal Research Assistant is an intelligent web-based platform designed to support legal professionals, students, and researchers. Equipped with advanced AI capabilities, this tool simplifies complex legal analysis by providing fast insights, structured references, and intelligent argument generation.


Key Features

✅ Legal Advice Engine: Provides AI-driven guidance for legal queries based on uploaded documents or user questions.
✅ Case Summarization: Uses NLP to condense lengthy case judgments into concise summaries.
✅ Citation Generator: Automatically formats references for case laws, statutes, and legal journals.
✅ Argument Generator: Suggests logical arguments based on case facts and legal precedents.
✅ Bias Detection: Identifies potential bias in judgments, legal language, or argument structure.
✅ IPC Search: Enables quick lookup of Indian Penal Code IPC sections for relevant laws.
✅ Legal Research Assistant: Streamlines research by analyzing multiple cases for patterns, judgments, and legal reasoning.
✅ Document Analysis: Extracts text from uploaded PDFs or DOC files, highlighting key points, clauses, and important legal terms

name: Arjun Jayakumar
description:
Study Planner and Learning Assistant
A personalized, college-specific study planner and learning assistant powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). This tool helps students organize their study schedules, track progress, and get context-aware answers from their uploaded study materials (e.g., PDFs). Designed to adapt to individual learning paces and deadlines, it combines a user-friendly frontend with a robust backend API.

Features
Document Upload & Processing: Upload PDFs and extract text for querying and analysis.
Study Progress Tracking: Tasks and works can be scheduled manually by the user to meet the deadlines.
Adaptive Study Schedules: Generate schedules based on learning pace, content complexity, and test deadlines.
RAG-Powered Q&A: Query study materials using natural language and receive relevant, context-aware answers.
Visual Feedback: Interactive UI with progress bars, calendars, and chat-like query responses.

name: Neeraj Mohan D S
description: A legal advisory AI.

name: Ashish Shibu Zachariah
description: Our Legal Chatbot is a user-friendly digital assistant that guides you through legal issues in a structured way. It begins by receiving your legal query—either through a typed message or document upload—and then quickly determines whether your issue is a high-level crime (like murder, POCSO cases, or narcotics offenses) or a general legal matter (such as employment disputes or contract issues). For serious cases, it immediately provides relevant legal sections and emphasizes the need for professional legal counsel, while for general matters, it asks follow-up questions to gather more details about your situation. Based on your answers, the chatbot analyzes your case, explains the necessary legal steps, outlines required documents, and simplifies applicable laws so you can understand your rights and options. Finally, it summarizes the information provided and asks for feedback, ensuring that your needs are fully addressed and offering further guidance if needed.

name: ABHAY PARAMESWER R
description:
Introduction Every second counts in a medical emergency. In heavy traffic, ambulances struggle to reach hospitals on time, costing precious lives. Our integrated system combines AI-powered traffic management with Digital Twin technology inside the ambulance to ensure seamless emergency response. Problem Statement

Traffic congestion causes significant delays in emergency response times.
Lack of real-time traffic management leads to inefficiencies in clearing paths for ambulances.
Manual intervention by traffic police is often slow and ineffective.
Medical professionals in hospitals lack real-time patient data before arrival.
Critical treatments are delayed due to lack of immediate health insights.
Doctors often have to make instant decisions with limited patient data, increasing the risk of errors. Proposed Solution: AI-Powered Emergency System Our AI-driven system integrates two key technologies:
ResQRoute: AI-based traffic management that detects ambulances and clears traffic automatically.
Digital Twin for Health: Inside the ambulance, AI builds a real-time patient clone using medical data to predict their health status and guide doctors before arrival.
Doctor Preparation System: AI provides hospitals with real-time patient insights, ensuring the medical team is prepared for immediate treatment upon arrival. How It Works
Ambulance Detection: AI cameras recognize ambulance symbols and prioritize traffic light changes.
Real-Time Traffic Adjustment: AI controls traffic signals dynamically to create an open path.
Patient Cloning Inside Ambulance: Medical devices inside the ambulance monitor vital signs and feed data to an AI model to simulate future health conditions.
Doctor & Hospital Preparation:
AI provides a real-time patient health clone to doctors.
Doctors analyze vital trends and predict possible complications before arrival.
AI suggests probable treatments based on patient history and symptoms.
Hospital staff prepares the necessary operation theaters, ICUs, or emergency rooms based on AI risk assessment.
Optimized Emergency Care: Predictive analytics help doctors make faster, more accurate decisions for treatment.


Here is the website like we deployed using streamlit: https://resqroute.streamlit.app/
